title: Drop2Inventory Premium
description: No more item entities. No more lag. Just clean, direct drops!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68cee6ad6dd0c0eb6016f9940bfaa204178d07d5_0.webp)Drop2Inventory Premium automatically sends block and mob drops directly into the player’s inventory instead of spawning item entities, significantly reducing lag.

Includes auto-smelt (supports all registered cooking recipes), auto-condense with configurable rules, hopper & redstone detection to protect farms, direct EXP handling, and per-player toggles.

Commands

/drop2inv – toggle Drop2Inventory for yourself

/drop2inv status [player] – check status

/drop2inv toggle <player> on|off – admin control

/drop2inv reload – reload config

Permissions

drop2inventory.use

drop2inventory.autosmelt

drop2inventory.autocondense

drop2inventory.reload

Compatible with Spigot & Paper 1.18+.
